nodes.name: Schedule — Weekdays 9am ET
nodes.notes: Triggers the outbound pipeline every weekday at 9am ET. Also manually triggerable via workflow_dispatch.

nodes.name: Initialize Batch Limits
nodes.notes: Sets daily batch ID and max emails per day (50) for sender reputation protection

nodes.name: Generate DMV Search Queries
nodes.notes: Generates all business-type × DMV-location combinations for Google Maps scraping

nodes.name: Split Into Batches
nodes.notes: Processes search queries in batches of 10 to stay within Apify rate limits

nodes.name: Apify — Google Maps Scraper
nodes.notes: Primary source: scrapes Google Maps for DMV service businesses with name, phone, website, email, rating, reviews

nodes.name: Apify — Yelp Scraper
nodes.notes: Secondary source: scrapes Yelp for businesses not on Google Maps

nodes.name: Normalize & Merge Leads
nodes.notes: Merges Google Maps + Yelp results, normalizes schema, discards leads without email

nodes.name: Deduplicate by Email
nodes.notes: Removes duplicate leads by email, keeping the record with the most data

nodes.name: Apify — Website Contact Scraper
nodes.notes: Scrapes each business website to extract contact emails, owner names, and contact form details

nodes.name: Enrich Website Contact Data
nodes.notes: Merges website contact data into lead record, extracts owner name from page content

messages.content: You are a sales qualification expert for NexusGate — an AI receptionist service that recovers missed calls and books appointments for local service businesses.

nodes.name: OpenClaw — Score Outbound Lead
nodes.notes: AI scores each lead on ICP fit for NexusGate's AI receptionist service

nodes.name: Parse Score JSON
nodes.notes: Parses LLM scoring response, validates score range, merges with lead data

nodes.name: Switch — Score Router
nodes.notes: Score ≥7 → cold email pipeline. Score <7 → log to disqualified_leads and stop.

nodes.name: Supabase — Insert Qualified Lead
nodes.notes: Inserts qualified lead (score ≥7) into outbound_leads table

nodes.name: Supabase — Log Disqualified Lead
nodes.notes: Logs leads with score <7 to disqualified_leads table for future review

messages.content: You are Ervin, founder of NexusGate. You write like a real person — direct, warm, no marketing speak.

=Write a cold outreach email for a local service business owner on behalf of NexusGate.

NexusGate is an AI receptionist that answers missed calls, books appointments, and follows up with leads 24/7 — with no new staff and no new software for the team.

Lead details:
- Business name: {{ $json.business_name }}
- Business type: {{ $json.business_type }}
- Owner name: {{ $json.owner_name }}
- City: {{ $json.city }}
- Personalization hook: {{ $json.personalization_hook }}
- Their specific pain point: {{ $json.pain_point }}

Email rules:
- Subject line: make it feel like a local, personal message — not a marketing blast
- Under 120 words total
- Open with the personalization hook — reference something real about their business
- Mention the free 60-second audit as the CTA (not a sales call)
- Link to: https://nexusgate.tech/#lead-capture
- Sign off as Ervin, Founder of NexusGate
- No buzzwords, no "I hope this finds you well", no bullet points
- Sound like a real person, not a SaaS company

Return only the subject line and email body. No preamble.
Format:
Subject: <subject line>

<body>

nodes.name: OpenClaw — Generate Cold Email
nodes.notes: Generates personalized cold email for each qualified lead

nodes.name: Parse Email Content
nodes.notes: Extracts subject line and body from OpenClaw email output

nodes.name: Gmail — Send Cold Email
nodes.notes: Sends the personalized cold email from ervin@nexusgate.tech via Gmail

nodes.name: Supabase — Mark Email Sent
nodes.notes: Updates outbound_leads record: email_sent=true, email_sent_at=now()

nodes.name: Supabase — Mark Audit Complete
nodes.notes: Webhook trigger from nexusgate.tech when lead completes free audit

nodes.name: Supabase — Mark Call Booked
nodes.notes: Webhook trigger from Calendly or booking flow when lead books a call

nodes.name: Webhook — Audit Complete Handler
nodes.notes: Receives POST from nexusgate.tech when a lead completes the free audit

nodes.name: Webhook — Call Booked Handler
nodes.notes: Receives POST from Calendly or booking flow when a lead books a strategy call

nodes.name: Slack — Call Booked Alert
nodes.notes: Alerts Ervin in Slack when a lead books a strategy call

nodes.name: Respond — Audit Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns 200 OK to the audit completion webhook

nodes.name: Respond — Booking Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns 200 OK to the call booked webhook
